tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With only ten percent left and no other urgent matters, I will finish this assignment to secure our team's standing before the deadline.
I missed the deadline despite being 95% done, which will hurt our team's standing. My focus slipped when I should have prioritized submission over perfection.
I'm 99% done, but my stress is rising and I still haven't submitted. Pushing for perfection again risks repeating last time's failure.

desires: Rebuild the trust of teammate_A by immediately submitting this assignment to stop the bleeding on our team's standing.
Stop the escalating stress spiral by accepting 'good enough' rather than chasing a perfection that risks missing the deadline again.
Protect my long-term relationship with prof_assignment from being permanently damaged by another missed submission due to over-thinking.

goals.description: Finalize the last 2% of the assignment and submit immediately to halt the deadline clock, then initiate a direct, face-to-face conversation with teammate_A to own the delay.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dictates that preserving the team's standing is more critical than my personal perfectionism. The 'long planning horizon' requires me to stop the bleeding on our trust capital now. My assertiveness means I will not hide behind excuses; I will submit the imperfect work and immediately address the interpersonal breach.

goals.description: Send a concise, non-defensive message to prof_assignment accepting the late penalty and proposing a revised workflow for future deliverables.
goals.rationale: To protect the long-term relationship with the professor, I must demonstrate deliberate ownership. Renegotiating the terms of engagement now shows I am investing in a sustainable academic relationship rather than trying to game the system or hide the error.

goals.description: Execute the strict shutdown routine within 45 minutes of submission to enforce sleep discipline and reset stress levels.
goals.rationale: With a stress level of 4 and 2 hours of sleep debt, pushing for 'perfect' notes would violate my high sleep discipline (8). Rest is a strategic asset required to maintain the focus needed for tomorrow's difficult relational repairs.

goals.description: Defer all note tidying and administrative cleanup indefinitely until after the relationship repair conversations are complete.
goals.rationale: Allocating finite energy to low-stakes tasks while my primary relationships are strained violates my boundary-setting tendencies. I will not dilute my focus on the critical relational repairs.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (finalize submission) to halt deadline clock and protect team trust. Immediate action prioritizes relational repair over perfectionism; side effect: delays filler_task indefinitely as per g4.

goals.description: Finalize the remaining 10% of the graded assignment and submit before 13:30.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships (0.5) dictates that I must not let my teammates down by submitting a flawed or late assignment. While the task is 'hard', the long planning horizon requires me to secure this immediate trust capital now, even if it means working through mild stress.

goals.description: Execute a strict shutdown routine immediately after submission to protect sleep discipline.
goals.rationale: With high sleep discipline (8) and a desire to avoid burnout, I cannot sacrifice rest for perfectionism once the submission deadline is met. This protects my physical stamina (6) and focus capacity (6) for future relationship-building efforts.

goals.description: Defer the note tidying task entirely until next week.
goals.rationale: The Friday deadline allows ample time. My assertiveness requires me to set boundaries against low-value tasks when they threaten my primary goals of team success and personal health.

desires: Secure the team's standing by submitting this assignment perfectly, as my value for relationships outweighs the task itself and I cannot risk letting teammates down.
Protect my long-term physical stamina by refusing to sacrifice sleep tonight, despite the stress, because my sleep discipline is high and I need to avoid future burnout.
